module:
Integration tests for context object propagation across subsystem boundaries.

These tests verify that context properties are properly propagated when
crossing between subsystems, ensuring consistent settings and behavior.

test_context_creation_and_inheritance.docstring: Test creation of BaseContext and its subclasses.

test_context_conversion_between_subsyste.docstring: Test converting context objects between subsystems.

test_language_preference_propagation.docstring: Test that language preferences propagate across subsystems.

test_content_type_propagation.docstring: Test that content type information propagates properly.

test_linguistic_to_tagging_context_propa.docstring: Test context propagation from linguistic to tagging system.

test_backward_compatibility.docstring: Test that services work with and without context objects.

test_context_to_options_conversion.docstring: Test converting context to options dictionary.

test_chunking_with_embedding_context.docstring: Test using embedding context with chunking service.
